answer:
\boxed{A}  

Bing Crosby died of a heart attack in 1977 after playing a round of golf at the La Moraleja golf course near Madrid. Elvis Presley died at Graceland in 1977, Charlie Chaplin died in Switzerland in 1977, and Groucho Marx died in 1977 in Los Angeles. Thus, only Bing Crosby matches the specific location and activity described.
